final:
module RefModule(
  input [3:0] a,
  input [3:0] b,
  input mode,
  input clk,
  output reg [3:0] result
);  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
    if (mode == 1) // addition mode
      result <= a + b;
    else // subtraction mode
      result <= a - b;
  end

endmodule
